text:
Hello, Doug!
 
 Sorry for the delayed response, I'm on a trip now and will get back
 only in about a week. Could you commit this patch yourself if you gave
 it a testing on a tinderbox? If you haven't, I will give it a run on
 tinderbox, but it will take some time.
 
 Thanks,
 Roman
